Package neqsim.process.research

Class ProcessResearchSpec.Builder

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.research.ProcessResearchSpec.Builder

      Returns:
      this builder

      maxOptimizationCases - maximum optimization cases

      this builder

      Sets the maximum graph synthesis depth.
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      this builder

      public ProcessResearchSpec.Builder setEvaluateCandidates(boolean evaluateCandidates)
      Sets whether candidates should be evaluated.
      Parameters:
      evaluateCandidates - true to run generated process candidates
      Returns:
      this builder

    • setEnableFeasibilityPruning

      public ProcessResearchSpec.Builder setEnableFeasibilityPruning(boolean enableFeasibilityPruning)
      Sets whether fast feasibility pruning is enabled.
      Parameters:
      enableFeasibilityPruning - true to enable pre-simulation pruning
      Returns:
      this builder

    • setIncludeSynthesisLibrary

      public ProcessResearchSpec.Builder setIncludeSynthesisLibrary(boolean includeSynthesisLibrary)
      Sets whether the built-in synthesis operation library should be included.
      Parameters:
      includeSynthesisLibrary - true to add curated synthesis operations
      Returns:
      this builder

    • setIncludeHeatIntegration

      public ProcessResearchSpec.Builder setIncludeHeatIntegration(boolean includeHeatIntegration)
      Sets whether heat-integration metrics are included.
      Parameters:
      includeHeatIntegration - true to run pinch analysis after candidate simulation
      Returns:
      this builder

    • setIncludeCostEstimate

      public ProcessResearchSpec.Builder setIncludeCostEstimate(boolean includeCostEstimate)
      Sets whether cost metrics are included.
      Parameters:
      includeCostEstimate - true to include cost proxies
      Returns:
      this builder

      public ProcessResearchSpec.Builder setIncludeEmissionEstimate(boolean includeEmissionEstimate)
      Sets whether emissions metrics are included.
      Parameters:
      includeEmissionEstimate - true to include emissions estimates
      Returns:
      this builder

      Returns:
      this builder
